'''Golga Besadii Fir''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] that served as the final [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] on behalf of his [[Unidentified Hutt government|government]] to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
He was assigned to the Hutt consulate on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. When the Hutts allied with the extragalactic [[Yuuzhan Vong]], Golga began to make preparations to leave Coruscant for Nal Hutta. It was at this point he received a visit from [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Viqi Shesh]] who the Hutt imagined what she would look like as a dancer.

The Senator hoped to pass informal intelligence to the Hutts of New Republic assets in the hope that this disinformation would be passed to the Hutt's Yuuzhan Vong allies.

==Personality==
Although a member of the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] clan, he had [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]] blood in him, which was possibly the reason he found [[Human/Legends|Human]] women attractive.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
